runTitle: Vercel preview targeted QA - dashboard serverId autofocus after guest login
coveredSurfaces: preview protected dashboard entry with automation bypass
guest login to dashboard on preview

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after preview verification; effective 12.3711 USD, billed 0 USD, no unexpected billed usage surfaced.

artifacts.label: Preview dashboard after guest login with missing serverId autofocus modal

notes: Protected preview allowed dashboard entry with x-vercel-protection-bypass header and redirected unauthenticated access to /login?redirectTo=%2Fdashboard.
The login page exposed a guest CTA, and guest login reached Dashboard | OpenManager AI without requiring a guest PIN.

After guest login, navigating to /dashboard?serverId=web-nginx-dc1-01 kept the dashboard route and rendered the target server marker, but the detail modal did not auto-open and the expected tabs 종합 상황 / 성능 분석 / 로그 & 네트워크 were not visible.

Deployment metadata reported gitCommitRef=main and gitCommitSha=ac18ca2f99e4ade8fcad2e0646e6d20cffd23de3, while the local branch under test was feat/reporter-dashboard-followups at 75ed79dffa785fcfd18567aa715644da650c9045. This preview should not be treated as verified evidence for the pushed branch changes.
